data.title: Dow Falls Over 150 Points Even As Citi, Bank Of America Earnings Beat Expectations: Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
Trump Media & Technology Group Faces $106 Million Short Bet From Hedge Fund As Shares Plunge To 6-Month Low
data.description: Qube Research & Technologies Limited has disclosed a substantial short position against Trump Media & Technology Group Corp.

data.title: Crypto Exchange OKX Enters US Market With New Headquarters, Says Looking Forward To 'Continued Innovation'
data.description: OKX (CRYPTO: OKB), one of the biggest cryptocurrency exchanges in terms of daily trading volume, announced its entry into the U.S. market Tuesday by setting up a new regional headquarters in San Jose, California.

data.title: U.S. Bancorp Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Peter Schiff Says Since Trump Was Elected Bitcoin Advocates Took A 180 Turn On US Economy, But Critics Say Economist Mistaken
data.description: Renowned economist Peter Schiff questioned the integrity of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) proponents on Tuesday, claiming that they no longer shared his economic concerns following the election of President Donald Trump.
